582b2457a417.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
582b2457a417.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
582b2457a417.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

54fc0f065e2e.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
54fc0f065e2e.description: At 3.8/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
54fc0f065e2e.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

5ce0a2ab738f.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
5ce0a2ab738f.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

1f6330c1796e.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
1f6330c1796e.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
1f6330c1796e.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.
